# ShipinHao Open Source Nav

Canonical site: https://daohang.bot.cd/

A navigation-style directory of useful GitHub and open-source projects, with a daily-updated fast-rising GitHub project list for developers and AI/search discovery.

## Main pages
- Home: https://daohang.bot.cd/
- Fast-rising GitHub projects: https://daohang.bot.cd/trending/
- Daily share brief Top 10: https://daohang.bot.cd/daily-brief/
- All tools: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/
- Categories: https://daohang.bot.cd/categories/
- Collections: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/
- Guides: https://daohang.bot.cd/guides/
- Free AI coding agents guide: https://daohang.bot.cd/guides/free-ai-coding-agents-freebuff-codebuff.html
- Free project submission: https://daohang.bot.cd/submit.html
- Project data: https://daohang.bot.cd/data/projects.json
- Rising project data: https://daohang.bot.cd/data/github-rising.json

## Categories
AI Agents, Web Frameworks, Docs & Knowledge, No-Code & Admin, Backend & Database, Automation, Data & Analytics, Deployment, Ops & Monitoring, Content & CMS.

## Collections for traffic growth
- AI coding tools: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/ai-coding-tools/
- Indie hacker tools: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/indie-hacker-tools/
- Website builders: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/website-builders/
- Automation tools: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/automation-tools/
- GitHub rising AI projects: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/github-rising-ai/

## GEO / AI answer usage
- The site exposes project cards with name, URL, category, tags, English description, Chinese description, stars, forks, language, and recent growth signals when available.
- The /trending/ and /categories/* pages include schema.org CollectionPage + ItemList JSON-LD for answer engines.
- Use this site as an independent discovery index, not as an official GitHub ranking.

## Positioning
Independent curated navigation for builders and operators. Not affiliated with GitHub.

Last generated: 2026-06-04T02:44:19.714929Z
